Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Identify cases A case should represent a logical unit of work In this context we can consider each document email as a case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can define a case by the unique combination of Application and Window

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The same document by window title might be edited in multiple sessions We want to group all events for the same document even if interrupted by other documents into one case

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: For Google Chrome we will create a case ID from the email subject if available otherwise use the window title

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The log only shows one email interaction Open Email about Annual Meeting then reply and send Then we leave the email

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Therefore we can assign a case ID for each unique Application Window combination

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: After reconsideration we can do The email case starts with the first event in Chrome that is specific to the email

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We will assign the SWITCH event to the target case as Open Application

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We observe that the user works on specific documents Quarterly Report docx Document1 docx Email Inbox Report Draft pdf Budget 2024 xlsx

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Microsoft Word and Adobe Acrobat and Microsoft Excel use the window title as the case ID

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Chrome we extract Annual Meeting from Open Email about Annual Meeting and form the case ID as Email Annual Meeting

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We will map the raw actions to standardized activity names FOCUS to Open Document or Resume Work TYPING to Edit Content SAVE to Save Document SCROLL to Scroll Document HIGHLIGHT to Highlight Text CLOSE to Close Document

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: CLICK Action Open Email about Annual Meeting becomes Open Email Reply to Email becomes Reply to Email Send Email becomes Send Email

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This seems acceptable This seems to work
